Tip of the day
Pay attention to the specifics of an achievement - some only count toward the unlock if a drop comes from an activity directly.

Quaint quiver

From Walkscape Walkthrough

This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.
Quaint quiver
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Back
Value: 7
Search
Keyword: 		Hunting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A little leather holster to hold onto your hunting arrows for you. Pretty simple.

The Quaint quiver item is a loot item.

Requirement

  • At least Hunting lvl. 5.

Attributes

+5% Chest finding While doing Hunting.
+2 Inventory space While doing Hunting.
Requires Arrows in your inventory.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Shop Purchases

Shop Name Location Region Item Type Stock Price
Adventurers' Guild Outpost Horn of Respite Jarvonia 1 10
Adventurers' Guild Swampost Halfmaw Hideout GDTE 1 10
